desc.en: Comprehensive reviews of LLM post-training, reasoning, and alignment.
desc.zh: 关于 LLM 后训练、推理与对齐的综合性综述。

desc.en: Instruction tuning and supervised fine-tuning methods, including PEFT/LoRA.
desc.zh: 指令微调与监督微调方法,包括 PEFT/LoRA 等参数高效方案。

desc.en: Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback and related alignment pipelines.
desc.zh: 基于人类反馈的强化学习及相关对齐流程。

desc.en: Direct preference-based methods such as DPO, IPO, KTO, and variants.
desc.zh: 基于偏好的直接优化方法,如 DPO、IPO、KTO 及其变体。

desc.en: Outcome and process reward models (PRM/ORM) and reward learning.
desc.zh: 结果与过程奖励模型 (PRM/ORM) 及奖励学习。

desc.en: RL policy optimization algorithms for LLMs: PPO, GRPO, RLOO, offline RL.
desc.zh: 面向 LLM 的强化学习策略优化算法:PPO、GRPO、RLOO、离线 RL 等。

desc.en: Chain-of-thought, long reasoning, and inference-time compute scaling.
desc.zh: 思维链、长程推理与推理时算力扩展。

name.zh: 蒙特卡洛树搜索 / 树搜索

desc.en: Monte Carlo Tree Search and tree/graph search-guided reasoning.
desc.zh: 蒙特卡洛树搜索及树/图搜索引导的推理方法。

desc.en: Distilling reasoning and capabilities from larger to smaller models.
desc.zh: 将推理能力从大模型蒸馏到小模型。

desc.en: Evaluation benchmarks and datasets for reasoning and alignment.
desc.zh: 面向推理与对齐的评测基准与数据集。

desc.en: Safety alignment, guardrails, and robustness of reasoning models.
desc.zh: 推理模型的安全对齐、护栏与鲁棒性。

desc.en: Open-source frameworks and libraries for RL / LLM fine-tuning.
desc.zh: 用于 RL / LLM 微调的开源框架与代码库。
